title: NDLEA Boss courtesy visit to Minister of Health and Social Welfare, - FinancialEDGE
description: Photos Caption: Chairman/Chief Executive Officer of NDLEA, Brig. Gen. MB Marwa (Rtd) CON, OFR, alongside top officials of the Agency, with Prof. Muhammad Ali Pate, CON, Coordinating Minister of Health and Social Welfare, during a courtesy visit to the Honourable Minister's office to seek further areas of collaboration, at the Federal Secretariat, Central Business District
html: Photos Caption: Chairman/Chief Executive Officer of NDLEA, Brig. Gen. MB Marwa (Rtd) CON, OFR, alongside top officials of the Agency, with Prof. Muhammad Ali Pate, CON, Coordinating Minister of Health and Social Welfare, during a courtesy visit to the Honourable Minister’s office to seek further areas of collaboration, at the Federal Secretariat, Central Business District (CBD), Abuja, on Friday, 30th May 2025
